overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a dark robe exploring a gothic castle interior. The character ascends a grand stone staircase and walks through torch-lit corridors with vaulted ceilings and stone architecture. The atmosphere is dark and atmospheric with warm artificial lighting from wall sconces and chandeliers.

events.description: character begins ascending the wide stone staircase
reaching the upper landing at the top of the staircase

agents.ego_description: character in dark robe with yellow house crest walking up the grand stone staircase

entered.detail: tall vertical banner with black emblem on yellow-green background hanging on stone wall
wide stone staircase with solid railings leading upward to upper level
wall-mounted torch providing warm orange flickering light
wall-mounted torch providing warm orange flickering light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a grand gothic hall with a large house banner hanging on the stone wall. The character approaches and begins ascending a wide stone staircase illuminated by wall-mounted torches, reaching the upper landing by the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle upper corridor with chandeliers

events.description: turning right into a narrower corridor section with rubble

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper corridor passing iron chandeliers and wooden doorways

entered.detail: ornate iron chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling
dark wooden door set in a stone archway
gothic stone archway framing the corridor ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an upper corridor with vaulted ceilings and iron chandeliers. The space features stone walls with wooden doorways and is illuminated by warm torchlight. The segment ends as the character turns into a narrower passage.

events.description: entering narrower corridor with rubble and debris scattered on floor
character ignites wand torch for additional light in darker section

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow debris-filled corridor while holding a lit wand for illumination

entered.detail: piles of broken stones and debris scattered across the floor
smaller stone archway leading to darker corridor section
wall-mounted fire brazier providing additional flickering light

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a narrower, more confined corridor with rubble and debris scattered across the stone floor. The lighting becomes dimmer, prompting the character to ignite a wand torch for illumination. The character walks through this dilapidated section toward a stone dead end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand gothic interior that gradually transitions from an opulent hall into a decaying, confined corridor. It begins in a vast hall beside a large house banner, following the character as they ascend a wide stone staircase illuminated by wall-mounted torches. As the character reaches the upper landing, the scene opens into a vaulted corridor featuring iron chandeliers and wooden doorways bathed in warm light. The space then shifts as the camera turns into a narrower passage, where the architecture becomes more dilapidated and rubble scatters across the stone floor. Finally, the lighting dims significantly, prompting the character to ignite a wand torch to light the way toward a stone dead end.
